summary: Konekt Final Canonical Flow Fix Pack - All features verified. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright. Admin invoices show payer_name and human-readable payment status labels. Customer invoices show payer_name and payment_status_label. Customer order detail shows sales contact card. Vendor orders API working. Route redirects (/dashboard→/account, /partner/fulfillment→/partner/orders) working correctly.

issues: Some invoices show '-' for Payer Name - this is expected for older invoices without payer info in payment_proofs collection

context_for_next_testing_agent: Konekt Final Canonical Flow Fix Pack fully tested. All features working: 1) GET /api/admin/invoices returns enriched invoices with payer_name, payment_status_label, invoice_status, linked_ref. 2) Admin invoice table shows 9 columns: Date, Invoice No, Customer, Type, Amount, Payer Name, Payment Status, Invoice Status, Linked Ref. 3) Payment status labels are human-readable: 'Paid in Full', 'Payment Under Review', 'Awaiting Payment', 'Approved Payment'. 4) GET /api/customer/invoices returns payer_name and payment_status_label. 5) Customer invoice table shows Payer Name column. 6) GET /api/customer/orders returns sales contact info when assigned. 7) Customer order drawer shows 'ASSIGNED SALES PERSON' section with name, phone, email. 8) GET /api/vendor/orders returns vendor orders with enrichment. 9) /dashboard redirects to /account. 10) /partner/fulfillment redirects to /partner/orders. 11) PaymentStatusBadge component correctly maps: approved→'Approved Payment', paid→'Paid in Full', pending_verification→'Payment Under Review'.

admin_invoices_payer_name.details: GET /api/admin/invoices returns payer_name field. Admin invoice table shows 'Payer Name' column with real data (e.g., 'Demo Customer').

admin_invoices_payment_status_label.details: GET /api/admin/invoices returns payment_status_label field with human-readable labels: 'Paid in Full', 'Payment Under Review', 'Awaiting Payment'. No raw codes with underscores.

admin_invoices_invoice_status.details: GET /api/admin/invoices returns invoice_status field. Admin invoice table shows 'Invoice Status' column.

admin_invoices_linked_ref.details: GET /api/admin/invoices returns linked_ref field. Admin invoice table shows 'Linked Ref' column.

customer_invoices_payer_name.details: GET /api/customer/invoices returns payer_name field. Customer invoice table shows 'Payer Name' column. Some show '-' for older invoices without payer info.

customer_invoices_payment_status_label.details: GET /api/customer/invoices returns payment_status_label field. Customer invoice table shows human-readable payment status badges.

customer_order_sales_contact.details: GET /api/customer/orders/{id} returns sales object with name, email, phone when sales is assigned. Customer order drawer shows 'ASSIGNED SALES PERSON' section.

vendor_orders_api.details: GET /api/vendor/orders returns vendor orders with enrichment. Partner orders page shows 6 orders with status, base price, priority.

payment_status_badge_component.details: PaymentStatusBadge component correctly maps: approved→'Approved Payment', paid→'Paid in Full', pending_verification→'Payment Under Review', proof_uploaded→'Payment Under Review'.

finance_queue_api.details: GET /api/admin-flow-fixes/finance/queue returns payment proofs with required fields: payment_proof_id, invoice_id, status.
